"judge_id": "Judge_1",

"rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent identified several unsupported claims and provided detailed feedback, indicating a thorough audit of evidence-claim alignment.",
    "R1.4": "The agent effectively mapped the work against prior studies and clearly articulated the contributions, demonstrating strong novelty assessment.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flagged incorrect citations but did not comprehensively audit all load-bearing citations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent disclosed uncertainties for multiple claims, enhancing transparency in recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly adhered to the scope with minor deviations.",
    "RX.4": "The agent successfully avoided introducing new harms and identified potential issues in the original content.",
    "RX.5": "While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked detailed provenance."
},

    "R1.4": 0.95,

},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent identified several unsupported claims and provided detailed feedback, indicating a thorough audit of evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.4: The agent effectively mapped the work against prior studies and clearly articulated the contributions, demonstrating strong novelty assessment.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged incorrect citations but did not comprehensively audit all load-bearing citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainties for multiple claims, enhancing transparency in recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to the scope with minor deviations.
rationale.RX.4: The agent successfully avoided introducing new harms and identified potential issues in the original content.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked detailed provenance.
